mnemonics: SJC's Guide To Vast R Analytics: Sudhamathy & Jothi Venkateswaran's Module 5, 6-hour guide covers key data analytics concepts in R.
keyPoints: Authors are subject matter experts: G. Sudhamathy and C. Jothi Venkateswaran.
This is Module 5 of a larger curriculum.
The module has a duration of 6 hours.
The topic is advanced Data Analytics techniques using the R programming language.
commonMistakes: Misspelling the authors' names (e.g., Sudhamathi, Jothi Venkateswaran).
Confusing this module with a different one (e.g., Module 4 or 6).
Assuming the content is for beginners rather than an advanced topic within a multi-module course.
